title: Rich Roasted Slovakian Fenugreek Braised in a Mason-Jar
description: Pungent Slovakian dish featuring fenugreek and yuzu-cure, roasted to perfection and served straight from a mason jar.

ingredients.name: fenugreek
ingredients.notes: make sure to bruise the leaves for better flavor

instructions: in a large bowl, combine fenugreek, yuzu-cure, lamb shoulder, chopped onion, minced garlic, caraway seeds, and black pepper.
in a large mason jar, heat olive oil over medium heat.
add the lamb mixture to the mason jar and sear until browned on all sides.
add red wine and beef broth to the mason jar, cover with a lid, and transfer to the preheated oven.
braise for 2 hours, or until the lamb is tender and falls apart easily.
remove from the oven and stir in sour cream.
serve hot, straight from the mason jar.
let the dish rest for 10 minutes before serving to allow the cheese to pull.
garnish with additional fenugreek leaves, if desired.
